column1: # F3 (NAMES) in the /Range Name Delete prompt.
# Manual: "After you select a command that automatically displays a list
# of names (for example, /File Retrieve, /Graph Save, /Range Name Create,
# or /Print [E,F,P] Options Name Use), press NAME (F3) to display a
# full-screen list of names." We treat /Range Name Delete the same way:
# F3 opens the picker; Enter on a row fills the prompt buffer with that
# name. A second Enter commits the delete.
# Define two names: sales over A1..A2, costs over B1.
# Names are sorted ascending — Down moves from costs to sales.
# Buffer now holds "sales"; we're back in the prompt.
# Confirm sales is gone by re-defining it without a duplicate error.
